title: Rich and Juicy American Cheese Stir-fry
description: A rich and juicy romantic American dish featuring a blend of cheese in a savory stir-fry, perfect for any meal.

ingredients.name: 8 ounces lean ground beef or chicken breast, diced
1 cup heavy cream
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's above 165°F (74°C) after heating to kill bacteria

ingredients.name: 2 cups shredded cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: Optional, can be omitted for a low-fat version

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onion and garlic; sauté until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add ground beef/chicken breast to the skillet. Cook until browned, breaking up any lumps with a spoon, about 5 minutes.
Stir in flour gradually while continuously stirring for about 1 minute until it absorbs all moisture and turns slightly golden.
Pour in heavy cream and bring to a simmer; stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
Gradually add shredded cheddar cheese. Stir constantly over medium heat until cheese is fully melted and sauce has thickened, about 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
Garnish with fresh parsley or chives before serving if desired.
